headline: Visual-variety build landed and the lead→gated-preview pipeline is documented + runnable. This session shipped the skin mechanism (design key + override-only presets), additive brand dials (fontPairing/shadow/spacingDensity/radius), section-variant rail hardening, the impeccable design-smell gate (#176) + skin design-critic rubric (#177), the claims/compliance acceptance guardrail (#149), a one-command gated Vercel preview (deploy-preview, #154), and LANDED the two bespoke preview apps (pnw-arborist + septic-response, #150) with fabricated review counts softened to the verified aggregate. Monroe's fabricated reviews/claims (#146) neutralized. New docs/PIPELINE-RUNBOOK.md captures the end-to-end lead->preview path so a fresh session runs it from a one-line prompt. 9 apps build clean; engine still frozen here (lives in ops). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: REVENUE PATH (human): deploy a real gated preview live + grant workflows scope / seed vars (#8/#112) — proves the pipeline end-to-end
REVENUE PATH (human): drop the Pexels key so auto-imagery flows (#14) — run fetch-photos locally today; note the sandbox egress block
Put pnw-arborist or septic-response in front of the real lead it was generated for — the actual sale
Decompose the bespoke-template extraction epic (#153) now the apps exist on main; build only behind a real bespoke-tier client
Design pass on the aesthetics-dial values (#86) in a dedicated skin session; source exact review counts at go-live (#185)
hirobius/ops follow-up: re-sync vendored lib/schema with fontPairing/shadow/spacingDensity/design so the ops agent can emit them
blocked: Autonomous LLM site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops) — the deterministic + session-as-agent path runs without it
impeccable critique/polish unreachable upstream (403); detect gate shipped instead (#175 closed)
